betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Radiation-Powered Engine§f converts §bnuclear waste§f into §bdecayed waste§f while generating energy.

§eFunction:§f
• Uses radiation to generate power
• Accelerates waste decay
• §aGuaranteed consistent decay times§f

§eAdvantages:§f
• Useful for waste processing automation
• Predictable operation
• Gets energy from "free" radiation

§eBlueprints:§f
Available from structures or §bBobmazon§f orders.

§aTip:§f Great for managing radioactive waste while extracting some value.
